privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How ALAB Property collects, uses and protects your data.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: ALAB Property is a real estate agency and legal practice based in Thailand. We respect your privacy and only collect the data we actually need to respond to your inquiry and walk you through a transaction. Below is a short, plain-language summary of what we receive, why we need it and how you can manage it.

collect.title: What data we collect
collect.body:
When you submit a form on the site, we receive your name, email, phone number (if you choose to share it), the text of your message and the checkbox indicating whether crypto payment interests you. You fill in these fields yourself — we never ask for anything beyond them.

When you browse property pages, we record the page view in anonymous analytics. To distinguish unique visitors without storing real IP addresses, we keep only a SHA-256 hash of the IP — in practice, the original address cannot be recovered from that hash.

purpose.title: How we use the data
purpose.body:
The contact details you submit are used for one thing only: to reach out to you about your inquiry, send a property selection, answer your legal questions and accompany the transaction.

Anonymous analytics help us understand which properties attract more interest so we can improve the catalogue. We do not run advertising, do not profile visitors and do not share data with ad networks.

processors.title: Who we share data with

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body:
We use only the cookies we genuinely need:

— `alab_access` — a functional cookie that confirms you have completed the site access step;
— next-intl cookie — remembers your interface language (English or Russian).

We do not set advertising or tracking cookies.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body:
We keep inquiry data for as long as needed to complete the transaction and to meet the accounting and tax obligations required by Thai law. If you ask us to delete your data sooner, we will do so within 30 days, except for the minimum we are legally required to retain.

Anonymous view analytics are not tied to your identity and are kept indefinitely in their anonymised form.

rights.title: Your rights

contact.title: Contact us about privacy
contact.body: For any question about how your data is handled, write to property@alabproperty.com. We respond in English and Russian.
